0.q: homologous overexpression in pear calli confirmed that PbeDof9.1 mitigates oxidative damage by boosting the activities of peroxidase (POD) and catalase (CAT) to scavenge reactive oxygen species (ROS), thereby reducing malondialdehyde (MDA) accumulation.

1.q: The expression of stress resistance-related gene pleiotropic drug resistance protein 1 (PbPDR1) significantly increased, a change which was induced by SUBPEP3.
